info.name: EventON APIfy API
info.description: Postman collection for the public MCP discovery routes and the administrator-protected EventON APIfy REST endpoints.

variable.value: xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx xxxx

request.description: Returns the public MCP schema manifest.
Returns one public MCP content-type manifest. Set `contentType` to `ajde_events` or `event_rsvps`.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Ride to Big Bear",
  "description": "Optional HTML content",
  "excerpt": "Ride to Big Bear is a one-day ride in Big Bear Lake on April 1, 2026 from 9:00 to 17:00 PT.",
  "status": "publish",
  "tags": ["bike night", "ducati"],
  "event_type": ["Rides", "Featured"],
  "start_date": "2026-04-01",
  "start_time": "09:00",
  "end_date": "2026-04-01",
  "end_time": "17:00",
  "timezone": {
    "key": "America/Los_Angeles",
    "text": "PT"
  },
  "event_status": "scheduled",
  "attendance_mode": "offline",
  "event_subtitle": "High-altitude ride day",
  "event_excerpt": "Ride to Big Bear is a one-day ride in Big Bear Lake on April 1, 2026 from 9:00 to 17:00 PT.",
  "location": {
    "name": "Big Bear Lake",
    "address": "123 Main St",
    "city": "Big Bear Lake",
    "state": "CA",
    "country": "US",
    "link": "https://maps.google.com/?q=Big+Bear+Lake",
    "link_target": true
  },
  "organizers": [
    {
      "name": "EventON APIfy",
      "email": "events@example.com"
    }
  ],
  "event_color": "#ff0000",
  "learn_more_link": "https://example.com/rides/big-bear",
  "learn_more_link_target": true,
  "flags": {
    "featured": true,
    "generate_gmap": true,
    "open_google_maps_link": true
  },
  "interaction": {
    "mode": "external_link",
    "url": "https://example.com/rides/big-bear/details",
    "new_window": true
  },
  "health": {
    "enabled": true,
    "outdoor": true
  },
  "rsvp": {
    "enabled": true,
    "capacity_enabled": true,
    "capacity_count": 75
  }
}

request.description: Partially update an existing EventON event.
Move an EventON event to the WordPress trash.
List RSVP attendee records. Requires the EventON RSVP addon and the RSVP attendee API capability.
Get the yes-only RSVP totals for an event. Requires the EventON RSVP addon and the RSVP summary API capability.
